canonical_definition: A benchmark for evaluating contextual meme understanding in vision-language models, consisting of 1,565 annotated Reddit posts with meme images, post text, and top comments, assessed across four tasks probing interplay, stance, connections, and intent.
papers: WangchanThaiInstruct: An instruction-following Dataset for Culture-Aware, Multitask, and Multi-domain Evaluation inThai

definitions.text: A benchmark for evaluating contextual meme understanding in vision-language models, consisting of 1,565 annotated Reddit posts with meme images, post text, and top comments, assessed across four tasks probing interplay, stance, connections, and intent.

relationships.paper: WangchanThaiInstruct: An instruction-following Dataset for Culture-Aware, Multitask, and Multi-domain Evaluation inThai
relationships.evidence: To address this critical limitation, we introduce MemeReaCon, a novel benchmark specifically designed to evaluate how LVLMs understand memes in their original context. (Abstract)

emnlp25: WangchanThaiInstruct: An instruction-following Dataset for Culture-Aware, Multitask, and Multi-domain Evaluation inThai

relationships.paper: WangchanThaiInstruct: An instruction-following Dataset for Culture-Aware, Multitask, and Multi-domain Evaluation inThai
relationships.evidence: MemeReaCon occupies a unique position by being the first benchmark, to our knowledge, specifically constructed to evaluate the fine-grained contextual reasoning required to understand memes as they are used in online posts. (Section 2)
